title: Major Tick Units ( MajorTickUnits)
text: Major Tick Units ( MajorTickUnits) Number of annotated units displayed on the meter or slider widget. The default value is 4 . MajorTickUnits = Number Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description For example, in the Meter widget, the default range is set from 0-100. When Major Tick Units is set to 4 , there are 5 annotated ticks, including the one for 0: 0 , 25 , 50 , 75 and 100 . Figure 1. Meter Widget with Default Values Example: Setting in ProcScript The range for a Meter widget (FLD1) is defined as 0-80. The following example sets the minor ticks to 2: $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "MinorTickUnits=2" Copy Figure 2. Meter Widget Applies To umeter (Meter) uslider (Slider) Related Links Minor Tick Units ( MinorTickUnits) Number of units that are displayed between two major ticks. The default is 5.
